title: Your Majesty Knows No Bounds

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: O Sovereign of All, Your name echoes
Across endless seas and mountain peaks
From stardust to earthen valleys below
Your majesty in whispers speaks

sections.label: Chorus
lines: What is man among Your grand design?
Mere breath among infinite stars that shine
Yet You crown us with glory divine
And set our feet on paths sublime

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: From children's laughter pure and clear
Rises strength that stills the storm
While constellations bend to hear
As ancient wisdom takes new form

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Commander of the cosmic dance
Creator of the morning light
You place the moon in midnight's trance
And guide the eagles in their flight

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Over flocks in emerald fields
Past dolphins in their ocean home
Through every creature that You shield
Your wonder makes itself known

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: O Sovereign of All, Your name resounds
From deepest sea to highest crown
In every heartbeat You are found
Your majesty knows no bounds

epigraph: how excellent is thy name in all the earth! who hast set thy glory above
